mapper.select: select id, title, region_name as regionName from courses where deleted_at is null order by case when #{regionName} is not null and region_name = #{regionName} then 0 else 1 end, created_at desc, id asc limit #{limit}

select id, title, addr1, content_type_id as contentTypeId from attractions where status = 'ACTIVE' and deleted_at is null and duplicate_of_attraction_id is null and content_type_id in ('38', '39') and addr1 ilike concat('%', #{regionName}, '%') order by read_count desc nulls last, id asc limit #{limit}
